title: Musical Allays
description: A mod that lets you play music discs on jukeboxes carried by allays!
body:
# Musical Allays A mod for Fabric/Quilt that allows you to play music discs on Jukeboxes carried by Allays. To play a music disc, right-click on an allay carrying a jukebox with a music disc in your main hand. To stop and retrieve the music disc, right-click on the allay with an empty main hand. [![](https://img.youtube.com/vi/71idFQo8E2A/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=71idFQo8E2A)
